title: Full coordinator subsystem for multi-agent orchestration
description:
Claude Code has coordinator/ as a full subsystem: task delegation, swarm mode, teammate roles, subagent lifecycle tracking. OpenClaudia advertises --coordinator mode but subagent.rs only covers 1:1 delegation.

## Gaps
- No teammate/swarm concept (multiple parallel subagents with shared context)
- No task delegation queue with dependencies
- No cross-session handoff state machine
- Agent identity + color assignments not tracked

## Scope
- src/coordinator/ module
- Task queue with dependency graph
- Multi-subagent spawn + result aggregation
- Agent metadata persistence (hooking into transcript.rs SerializedMessage agent-name/color entries)

## References
- /home/doll/claude-code/coordinator/ (TS source)
- /home/doll/claude-code/utils/concurrentSessions.ts
